title: The Krieg Pirates Bring War to the Baratie
description: On pages 16–18, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's him! Zoro! RORONOA ZORD OF THE THREE SWORD STYLE...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! We're gonna lose sight of the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If you're a competent swordsman by any means, then I can demonstrate the clear difference in strength between you and I,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: without needing to cross blades at all.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But still, you dare to challenge me. Does your bravery come from your conviction...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: and a promise to a friend.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wonder if they'll count me as their friend,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wonder if we can even meet again...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I want to hurry up and become free,

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
